rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Assumptions and guarantees for ports should reference visible feature names or named constants
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and named constants in AGREE contracts to ensure type alignment
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Boolean expressions in AGREE must use proper type matching (e.g., bool = int >= min and int <= max)
Component type contracts should define assumptions and guarantees using valid feature names or constants
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level AGREE contracts in component type scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes
